description: A U-channel extruded along the X-axis, centered at the origin, with defined wall and base thicknesses.
notes: The U-channel should be modeled with the cross-section in the YZ plane and extruded along the X-axis. Centering at the origin means the X-bounds are [-40, 40], Y-bounds are [-20, 20], and Z-bounds are [-15, 15]. The base is at Z=-15 to Z=-12, and the walls extend up to Z=15 on the sides Y=[-20, -17] and Y=[17, 20].
